criteria.name: Conclusion with key findings and recommendations
criteria.evidence: Cell 25 contains a substantive conclusion (~1800 chars) with 5 key findings covering data coverage, data quality, FWI computation, station redundancy (PCA + clustering), and specific recommendations for Stanley Bridge, Tracadie, and Stanhope retention. No placeholder text detected.

criteria.name: All cells execute top-to-bottom without errors
criteria.evidence: Exit gate `.venv/bin/pytest tests/test_analysis_notebook.py -q` passes 15/15 tests. Notebook executes via nbconvert ExecutePreprocessor with no cell errors. All acceptance criteria from sub-phases 10/10b/10c/10d verified through output inspection.

summary: Phase 10d (Analysis: Conclusion) passes both acceptance criteria. The notebook has a substantive conclusion cell covering data coverage, quality, FWI, redundancy analysis, and specific recommendations. All 15 exit gate tests pass with the full notebook executing cleanly top-to-bottom. Note: Ralph's commit (b3ea284) contained only a diary update — no source/test changes were made. The work being reviewed was already present from earlier commits, and the verdict was left PENDING from a previous orchestrator cycle.
